title: Socha Na Tha
desc: Viren cant imagine having an arranged marriage. His parents want him to meet Aditi. They refuse to get married but stay friends. Will Cupid strike and change their minds?

title: Anjali
desc: Years later, Chitra learns her child, once thought dead, is alive but has a cognitive disorder. Her family then faces several struggles while raising the child.

title: Sandwich
desc: Sher Singh juggles life with his two wives, Nisha and Sweety, but when they unexpectedly meet, his troubles multiply, leading to a series of hilarious situations.

title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
desc: Happy, a lively Indian girl, elopes on her wedding day to marry Guddu. Mistakenly landing at a Pakistani politician's home, she sparks chaos, confusion, and hilarious adventures.

title: Mukkabaaz
desc: Aspiring boxer Shravan Singh clashes with Bhagwan Das Mishra, the powerful head of a boxing federation. Matters escalate when Shravan falls for Bhagwan's niece, Sunaina.

title: No Entry
desc: Kishan, a loyal husband, disapproves of his friend Prem's infidelity. But when introduced to Bobby, a prostitute, Kishan's morals are tested, leading to complications, secrets, and unexpected choices.

title: Pippa
desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry fights bravely on the eastern front during the 1971 Indo-Pak war, proving his courage, strength, and dedication to the nation.

title: Koyla
desc: Shankar, a mute servant, tricks Gauri into marrying his employer with a false photo. But Gauri falls for Shankar, fighting against odds to be with him.

title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
desc: Inspector Karan seeks justice for his brother Arjun's murder. But Deepak, an actor, complicates things by shadowing him to add realism to his role.

title: Daud
desc: Nandu, a petty thief, is tasked with smuggling a mysterious packet. With police chasing him, he must escape and deliver it on time, risking everything for survival.

title: Yuvraaj
desc: After Deven and Danny learn their late father left all his wealth to their brother Gyanesh, who has special needs, they plot a way to take control of the inheritance.

title: Kya Kool Hain Hum 3
desc: Kanhaiya, an adult film actor in Thailand, falls for Shalu. To win over her traditional father, he fakes a respectable family with help from his quirky co-stars.

title: Akhanda
desc: When the nefarious Varadarajulu targets Murali Krishna, a devoted follower of Lord Shiva, Akhanda steps in and goes to any extent to defeat the evil.

title: Code Name: Tiranga
desc: An undercover agent sets out to avenge the 2001 terrorist attacks on Indian soil, but her pursuit of justice soon leads her to a dangerous point of no return.

title: Lost
desc: After a plane crash, the survivors find themselves stranded on a mysterious island. As they struggle to stay alive, they must unite when they discover they are not alone.

title: Phool Aur Kante
desc: Ajay, the son of a crime boss, lives peacefully until rivals kidnap his father. Forced into the underworld, he must confront danger and fight to save his family.
